prs.title: feat: add `from md` command to convert markdown text into structured data
fix: update Cargo.toml files to use workspace edition and rust-version
feat: add `config.auto_cd_always` option
Preserve pipeline metadata if detect type cannot determine the input
fix(parser): an edge case of parse_unit_value
`http` commands' output metadata properly includes content-type
docs: fix typo in flags section comment
Update rmcp to version 1.3.0 and adjust session manager configuration
fix: preserve metadata when rendering `Custom` value in `table` command
Add option to save leading-space commands to history.txt
doc: fix `cargo doc` warnings
nu-protocol: Implement DerefMut for PipelineExecutionData
Fix parsing of braced-value optinal cell paths
Update IDE help text to specify cursor position and file context
feat: enhance script argument parsing to handle newlines and whitespace correctly
build: fix cross compilation to/from windows
docs: fix typo in completer comment
Deprecate `PipelineData::metadata()`
Restructure `nu-test-support` crate and add lots of docs
Customize binary hex styles with color_config
Update metadata handling for `skip` and `reject` command
Fix known external name lookup under alias shadowing
Refactor error handling for directory removal in rm command
Fix rm symlink trailing slash
Preserve pipeline metadata in  first and last for list/range streams
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in remaining nu-command files
fix(parser): string interpolation with unclosed `)`
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in nu-protocol and nu-mcp
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in nu-cli and main
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in nu-command filters and strings
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in plugin crates
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in which_.rs
fix(datetime): enhance timezone and offset handling in datetime parsing
Only update PR labels on opened or ready PRs
Apply `#[doc(no_inline)]` to `prelude` modules
Update metadata handling for `get` command
Add `From` conversions for `ErrorSite`
Allow showing an error source for generic errors
Add `GenericError::new_internal_with_location`
nu-protocol: add take_metadata and with_path_columns
refactor `explore` family of commands so that it's easier to understand and maintain
add search capability to `explore config` command
refactor(nu-protocol): Replace `ShellError::GenericError` with `ShellError::Generic(GenericError)`
feat(mcp): auto-promote long-running evaluations to background jobs
Update the names in `keybindings list`
Feat: native clipboard (using arboard)
fix http head http options missing full and allow error
refactor(nu-command/testing): refactor more command integration tests
Add cross-shell search terms to 16 commands (bash/CMD/PowerShell)
refactor: defer compiling blocks
refactor: cleaner api for embedded config files
feat: Add completions to built-in commands with a predetermined list of suggestions.
`compact` works on records too
Using `break`/`continue` outside loops raises a compile error
fix(hooks): updating `$env.config` now correctly updates config state.
feat!: Explicit cell-path case sensitivity syntax
More granular type widening and stricter type checking
Add tests for ast-grep rules
Command-wide completions
refactor!: collecting a stream with an error raises an error
feat: `watch` returns a stream of events as a table when called without a closure
implement `FromValue` for `std::time::Duration` and refactor relevant commands to utilize that
feat: impl<B> for (From/Into)Value for Cow<'_, B> where B::Owned: (From/Into)Value
feat(get,select,reject): add `--ignore-case` which interprets cell-paths case insensitively, analogous to `--optional`
feat: `null` values can be spread as if they are empty lists or records.
refactor: run `env_change` hooks before `pre_prompt` hooks
fix(input list): don't leak ansi styling, fuzzy match indicator preserves styles
fix(get): run_const uses `--optional` flag
fix bare interpolation regression
group by to table empty
fix(parser): repeated `(` / parenthesis / opened sub-expressions causes memory leak
fix: highlighting a where command with invalid arguments can duplicate text
fix(overlay use): report errors in export-env
feat(completion): enable nucleo's `prefer_prefix` option
fix(overlay): `overlay use` and `overlay hide` now update config state
refactor(get,select,reject)!: deprecate --ignore-errors in favor of --optional
fix(get): to be consistent with regular cell-path access on `null` values
refactor(nu-command/parse)!: Return `null` for unmatched capture groups, rather than empty string
perf: reorder cell-path member accesses to avoid clones
`to <format>`: preserve round float numbers' type
fix(std/log): Don't assume env variables are set
feat(std-rfc): add `iter` module and `recurse` command
Update deprecation warnings
fix: implicitly running .ps1 scripts with spaces in path
feat(where): Support stored closure
fix parsing of bare word string interpolations that start with a sub expression
Add `SyntaxShape::OneOf` syntax users can use
docs(explore): Add ":nu" back to the help text
refactor `Value::follow_cell_path` to reduce clones and return `Cow`
Replace Span::unknown() with real spans in nu_plugin_polars
fix(parse): support char lbrace before trailing capture
fix(nu-command/reject): make `reject` command forward error value properly
fix(http): handle x- vendor prefix in Content-Type for automatic parsing
Replace Span::unknown() with Span::test_data() in test code
Streamline CI Cargo Checks
Fix experimental-options consuming script path
fix(parser): do not check for reserved variable names in external signature
detect lexer-stage errors at highlighting
Revert "detect lexer-stage errors at highlighting"
fix: failed to parse manifest error
use strict comparison for float sorting to avoid panics - fixes #16750
fix(parser): new scope for where condition so we can have variables named `it`
Allow `--content-type` to accept `null` in `metadata set`
chore: Update to noun output to be more compact when `--indent n` is used
fix: enhance MCP mode handling and output behavior across commands
allow par-each to stream except with --keep-order via mspc
Add `test_cell_path!()` macro
refactor(nu-command): update tests for `reject` command
